agents.name: the Bull
agents.mandate: Steelman the 10yr quantum thesis. Maximize upside. Sized IONQ biggest of the panel.

agents.name: the Bear
agents.mandate: Survive the drawdowns. Favor trillion-dollar balance sheets. Hold dry powder.

agents.name: Macro
agents.mandate: Position for the backdrop, not the theme. Power is the binding constraint on AI+quantum compute.

agents.name: Flow
agents.mandate: Own flow-clean vehicles. Avoid names with active ATM shelves and retail crowding.

agents.name: the Historian
agents.mandate: Apply base rates from prior thematic waves — most pure-plays go to zero over 10yr.

scoring: Brier + log-loss on T+30 / T+90 / T+365 direction calls, locked thesis hash at prediction time. Re-weight after >=20 resolved predictions per agent.
